title: thlaspi marginatum
intro: Thlaspi marginatum, also known as Mountain Thlaspi, is a type of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Thlaspi marginatum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a poultice or applied topically in its raw form.
